What is an Integrated LED?

An integrated LED refers to a lighting fixture that has the LED light source built directly into the fixture itself, rather than using a separate, replaceable LED bulb. This design provides a sleek, modern appearance and often results in a more energy-efficient and longer-lasting lighting solution. Since the LED diodes are incorporated into the fixture, they are specifically engineered to work seamlessly with the fixture's design and optimize its performance, resulting in better light distribution, heat dissipation, and overall durability.

H1: House Side Shield for Street Lights
Product Description:
180° Acorn Post Top Aluminum Light Pollution Device

To combat the growing issue of light pollution in urban and suburban areas, light shields, also known as light control devices, are essential accessories for street lamps. These devices help direct light output to the desired area, preventing glare and trespass of light into unwanted spaces. By installing this light shield on street lamps, municipalities can minimize light pollution, ensuring that light is directed only where it's needed, and not into the neighboring properties.

Features

  • Incon Lighting - Works with 865, 870, 872, 873, 874, 876, 878, 900 and 976 Series
  • Reduction of Light Pollution - Directs only where illumination is needed, and not into the sky or neighboring properties.

  • Enhanced Visibility and Safety - By controlling the direction of light, it improve visibility for pedestrians and drivers, ensuring safer streets and walkways.
  • Neighborhood Aesthetics - Light shields prevent uncontrolled street lighting from entering homes, reducing discomfort and sleep disruption.
